product_overview: Ownly is an AI-powered purchase manager that helps users organize receipts, invoices, warranties, manuals, and subscription details in one place. It gives users a dashboard view of their purchase records and related ownership information.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access the app
View a dashboard that summarizes purchase-related records
Manage and review receipts, warranties, and manuals from a central place

features.name: User Signup and Login
features.description: Users can create an account or sign in with email and password to access their Ownly workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/signup -> Enter account details with email and password -> Submit the signup form -> See account access established
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Users can open the main dashboard to review an overview of receipts, purchases, and warranties.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View overview of receipts, purchases, warranties

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials

features.name: Dashboard
user_interactions: View overview of receipts, purchases, warranties
